proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with feature_009=1 have more negative dependency_BRAF scores than cell lines with feature_009=0.
Cell lines with feature_014=1 have more negative dependency_KRAS scores than cell lines with feature_014=0.
Cell lines with feature_022=1 have more negative dependency_EGFR scores than cell lines with feature_022=0.
Cell lines with feature_024=1 have more negative dependency_ERBB2 scores than cell lines with feature_024=0.
Cell lines with feature_027=1 have more negative dependency_RIT1 scores than cell lines with feature_027=0.

analyses.result_summary: Welch comparison: dependency_BRAF mean was -0.8047 in feature_009=1 cell lines (n=5574) versus -0.2495 otherwise; the subgroup was much more dependent.
Welch comparison: dependency_KRAS mean was -0.5594 in feature_014=1 cell lines (n=11842) versus -0.2520 otherwise.
Welch comparison: dependency_EGFR mean was -0.6010 in feature_022=1 cell lines (n=3880) versus -0.2524 otherwise.
Welch comparison: dependency_ERBB2 mean was -0.6856 in feature_024=1 cell lines (n=4890) versus -0.2535 otherwise.
Welch comparison: dependency_RIT1 mean was -0.3527 in feature_027=1 cell lines (n=4560) versus -0.2572 otherwise.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher feature_016 is associated with more negative dependency scores across dependency_BRAF, dependency_EGFR, dependency_ERBB2, dependency_KRAS, dependency_RIT1, dependency_KIF18A, dependency_TMED10, dependency_DHX9, dependency_POLR2A, and dependency_RPL11, with the largest slope for dependency_POLR2A.

analyses.result_summary: Linear screen for dependency_BRAF on feature_016: slope -0.1101 dependency units per 1.0 feature_016 increase; correlation r=-0.0564.
Linear screen for dependency_EGFR on feature_016: slope -0.1080 dependency units per 1.0 feature_016 increase; correlation r=-0.0600.
Linear screen for dependency_ERBB2 on feature_016: slope -0.1002 dependency units per 1.0 feature_016 increase; correlation r=-0.0538.
Linear screen for dependency_KRAS on feature_016: slope -0.1238 dependency units per 1.0 feature_016 increase; correlation r=-0.0664.
Linear screen for dependency_RIT1 on feature_016: slope -0.0881 dependency units per 1.0 feature_016 increase; correlation r=-0.0504.
Linear screen for dependency_KIF18A on feature_016: slope -0.0830 dependency units per 1.0 feature_016 increase; correlation r=-0.0391.
Linear screen for dependency_TMED10 on feature_016: slope -0.1012 dependency units per 1.0 feature_016 increase; correlation r=-0.0581.
Linear screen for dependency_DHX9 on feature_016: slope -0.1086 dependency units per 1.0 feature_016 increase; correlation r=-0.0623.
Linear screen for dependency_POLR2A on feature_016: slope -0.3048 dependency units per 1.0 feature_016 increase; correlation r=-0.1723, the strongest feature_016 relationship.
Linear screen for dependency_RPL11 on feature_016: slope -0.1150 dependency units per 1.0 feature_016 increase; correlation r=-0.0651.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with feature_011=colorectal have more negative dependency_KIF18A scores than non-colorectal cell lines.
Cell lines with feature_035=1 have more negative dependency_KIF18A scores than cell lines with feature_035=0.
Cell lines with feature_028>=0.819, the upper quartile of feature_028, have more negative dependency_KIF18A scores than the remaining cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: Welch comparison: dependency_KIF18A mean was -0.7204 in feature_011=colorectal cell lines (n=5816) versus -0.2524 otherwise.
Welch comparison: dependency_KIF18A mean was -0.5447 in feature_035=1 cell lines (n=9285) versus -0.2526 otherwise.
Welch comparison: dependency_KIF18A mean was -0.4694 in feature_028>=0.819 cell lines (n=12508) versus -0.2526 otherwise.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative dependency_KIF18A association for feature_011=colorectal is amplified in cell lines with feature_035=1 compared with feature_035=0.
The negative dependency_KIF18A association for feature_011=colorectal is amplified in cell lines with feature_028>=0.819 compared with feature_028<0.819.
The negative dependency_KIF18A association for feature_035=1 is amplified in cell lines with feature_028>=0.819 compared with feature_028<0.819.

analyses.result_summary: Two-predicate interaction screen for dependency_KIF18A: the feature_011=colorectal by feature_035=1 interaction coefficient was -0.6822; the double-positive mean was -0.9425 versus about -0.25 in the other cells.
Two-predicate interaction screen for dependency_KIF18A: the feature_011=colorectal by feature_028>=0.819 interaction coefficient was -0.6691; the double-positive mean was -0.9288.
Two-predicate interaction screen for dependency_KIF18A: the feature_035=1 by feature_028>=0.819 interaction coefficient was -0.4698; the double-positive mean was -0.7311.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with the complete subgroup definition feature_011=colorectal, feature_035=1, and feature_028>=0.819 have much more negative dependency_KIF18A scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: Three-predicate subgroup test after the KIF18A interaction screen: mean dependency_KIF18A was -1.1119 in feature_011=colorectal AND feature_035=1 AND feature_028>=0.819 cell lines (n=3133) versus -0.2530 in all other cell lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with feature_022=1 and feature_016>=0.964 have more negative dependency_EGFR scores than all other cell lines.
Cell lines with feature_027=1 and feature_023<=4.230 have more negative dependency_RIT1 scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: Refined EGFR subgroup test: dependency_EGFR mean was -0.6253 in feature_022=1 AND feature_016>=0.964 cell lines (n=964) versus -0.2727 otherwise.
Refined RIT1 subgroup test: dependency_RIT1 mean was -0.3761 in feature_027=1 AND feature_023<=4.230 cell lines (n=1145) versus -0.2633 otherwise.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with feature_016>=0.964, feature_027=1, and feature_017<=1.956 have more negative dependency_TMED10 scores than all other cell lines.
Cell lines with feature_016>=0.964 and feature_023>=5.669 have more negative dependency_DHX9 scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: Exploratory three-predicate TMED10 subgroup: mean dependency_TMED10 was -0.3556 in feature_016>=0.964 AND feature_027=1 AND feature_017<=1.956 cell lines (n=307) versus -0.2534 otherwise.
Two-predicate DHX9 subgroup: mean dependency_DHX9 was -0.3892 in feature_016>=0.964 AND feature_023>=5.669 cell lines (n=3320) versus -0.3297 otherwise.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with feature_016>=0.964, feature_010=adenocarcinoma, and feature_002>=4.439 have more negative dependency_POLR2A scores than all other cell lines.
Cell lines with feature_016>=0.964, feature_018=1, and feature_031>=0.654 have more negative dependency_RPL11 scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: Exploratory three-predicate POLR2A subgroup: mean dependency_POLR2A was -0.5454 in feature_016>=0.964 AND feature_010=adenocarcinoma AND feature_002>=4.439 cell lines (n=359) versus -0.4182 otherwise.
Exploratory three-predicate RPL11 subgroup: mean dependency_RPL11 was -0.4193 in feature_016>=0.964 AND feature_018=1 AND feature_031>=0.654 cell lines (n=609) versus -0.2681 otherwise.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A systematic dependency-heterogeneity search across all outcomes nominates feature_009=1 for dependency_BRAF, feature_022=1 plus feature_016>=0.964 for dependency_EGFR, feature_024=1 for dependency_ERBB2, feature_014=1 for dependency_KRAS, feature_027=1 plus feature_023<=4.230 for dependency_RIT1, feature_011=colorectal plus feature_035=1 plus feature_028>=0.819 for dependency_KIF18A, feature_016>=0.964 plus feature_027=1 plus feature_017<=1.956 for dependency_TMED10, feature_016>=0.964 plus feature_023>=5.669 for dependency_DHX9, feature_016>=0.964 plus feature_010=adenocarcinoma plus feature_002>=4.439 for dependency_POLR2A, and feature_016>=0.964 plus feature_018=1 plus feature_031>=0.654 for dependency_RPL11 as the strongest interpretable negative-dependency subgroups.

analyses.result_summary: Systematic search final check for dependency_BRAF: feature_009=1 had mean -0.8047 versus -0.2495 otherwise.
Systematic search final check for dependency_EGFR: feature_022=1 AND feature_016>=0.964 had mean -0.6253 versus -0.2727 otherwise.
Systematic search final check for dependency_ERBB2: feature_024=1 had mean -0.6856 versus -0.2535 otherwise.
Systematic search final check for dependency_KRAS: feature_014=1 had mean -0.5594 versus -0.2520 otherwise.
Systematic search final check for dependency_RIT1: feature_027=1 AND feature_023<=4.230 had mean -0.3761 versus -0.2633 otherwise.
Systematic search final check for dependency_KIF18A: feature_011=colorectal AND feature_035=1 AND feature_028>=0.819 had mean -1.1119 versus -0.2530 otherwise.
Systematic search final check for dependency_TMED10: feature_016>=0.964 AND feature_027=1 AND feature_017<=1.956 had mean -0.3556 versus -0.2534 otherwise.
Systematic search final check for dependency_DHX9: feature_016>=0.964 AND feature_023>=5.669 had mean -0.3892 versus -0.3297 otherwise.
Systematic search final check for dependency_POLR2A: feature_016>=0.964 AND feature_010=adenocarcinoma AND feature_002>=4.439 had mean -0.5454 versus -0.4182 otherwise.
Systematic search final check for dependency_RPL11: feature_016>=0.964 AND feature_018=1 AND feature_031>=0.654 had mean -0.4193 versus -0.2681 otherwise.
